title: Schema extension: computeBudgetCpuHours for computation-run tasks
context: bigger-pi is an open, distributed, verification-first effort to compute more digits of pi on donated compute; the public good is the open, reproducible, independently-verified toolchain, chunk-coordination protocol, and provenance ledger. The tokenEstimate enum does not capture CPU-hours and there is no compute-budget cap field, so this backlog task proposes an optional computeBudgetCpuHours field (analogous to fundedBudgetUsd) for computation-run tasks, gated on a governance decision and kept backward-compatible with the agent-neutral schema.
objective: Propose and implement an optional, backward-compatible computeBudgetCpuHours schema field for computation-run tasks, gated on governance approval.
acceptanceCriteria: Proposes and implements an optional computeBudgetCpuHours field (analogous to fundedBudgetUsd) for computation-run tasks, gated on a governance decision.
The change is additive and backward-compatible (existing tasks remain valid) with schema tests; MIT-licensed.
output: A PR adding the optional, backward-compatible computeBudgetCpuHours schema field with tests.
